news.summary: Montreal-based Haivision Systems Inc. is set to disclose its financial results for the second quarter ending April 30, 2025. Known for offering critical, real-time video networking and visual collaboration solutions worldwide, Haivision is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol HAI. The official announcement will be made after...
news.headline: Haivision to announce Q2 fiscal 2025 results on June 11, 2025. Headquarters in Montreal, ticker symbol TSX: HAI.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, M-tron Industries, Inc. (NYSE American: MPTI) disclosed plans for its 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders, scheduled for June 10, 2025, in New York City. The upcoming Annual Meeting is a significant event for Mtron, providing an opportunity for shareholders to engage with the company's leadership.
news.headline: M-tron Industries, Inc. to hold investor presentation and annual meeting of stockholders on June 10, 2025 in NYC.

news.summary: Webull Corp (NASDAQ: BULL) saw a decline in after-hours trading following the release of its first-quarter financial results. The company reported Q1 revenue of $117.37 million, marking a 32% increase from the previous year's $88.94 million. This growth was primarily driven by a surge in account numbers and trading volumes. Despite the revenue boost, Webull reported a loss of six cents per share for the quarter. Additionally, total customer assets saw a significant 45% increase year-over-year. For more details, readers can access the complete article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Webull Q1 earnings: Revenue $117.37M, up 32% YoY, loss 6 cents/share. Shares slide post-results.

news.summary: Guardant Health, Inc., a prominent precision oncology company listed on Nasdaq under GH, revealed plans to share findings from over 19 studies at the 2025 American Society for Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting in Chicago. The data to be presented includes significant insights from the Phase 3 SERENA-6 trial. This trial showcases the pivotal contribution of Guardant's liquid biopsy tests in various aspects of cancer management, such as screening, therapy selection, and recurrence monitoring. The range and depth of the data signify the importance of Guardant's innovative approaches in advancing oncology research and patient care.
news.headline: Guardant Health to present data from 19+ studies at ASCO Annual Meeting, showcasing liquid biopsy's role in precision oncology.

news.summary: Intuit, a financial software company, exceeded Wall Street's expectations in its fiscal third quarter primarily due to a successful tax-preparation season. This led to an impressive performance in the April quarter, showcasing Intuit's strong performance in the tax-prep business. The company's positive results for the quarter reflect robust figures surpassing analysts' forecasts.
news.headline: Intuit exceeded Wall Street's expectations in Q3 due to strong tax-prep season, driving business success.

news.summary: Following the release of its Q1 earnings report, Workday's stock experienced a decline. Despite reporting earnings that exceeded estimates, the software maker had initially set lower expectations. While the guidance provided was in line with expectations, the stock fell following the news.
news.headline: Workday stock falls despite Q1 earnings beating estimates due to lowered expectations, guidance meets expectations.

news.summary: Autodesk exceeded analyst expectations for its fiscal Q1 and provided a forecast that surpasses current projections. The stock saw a significant increase in after-hours trading. The post highlights Autodesk's strong performance in Q1.
news.headline: Autodesk surpasses Q1 estimates, predicts higher earnings; stock soars in after-hours trading.
The number of victims of the missile strike on Lgov in the Kursk region has risen to 16, Khinshtein reported.

news.summary: Beaver Hollow Wellness has decided to retract its candidates for the Board of Directors, effectively halting the proxy contest. To ensure your vote is included, make sure to vote using the BLUE proxy card. This development was announced in Elma, N.Y., on May 22, 2025, through Servotronics, Inc. (NYSE American – SVT).
news.headline: Servotronics ends proxy contest as Beaver Hollow Wellness withdraws nominees for the Board of Directors. Vote now on BLUE proxy card.

news.summary: The article discusses the potential impact of the SEC’s decision on a spot XRP ETF on the cryptocurrency market. Currently, there is $2.2 billion in XRP futures, indicating growing institutional investor demand. XRP has underperformed the market despite bullish events in 2025. XRP's price fell 6% in the past three months, while the overall crypto market capitalization rose 10%. There is hope for a 45% rally to $3.50, with rising confidence in derivatives metrics. The open interest on XRP futures has increased to 923 million XRP, with leveraged positions signaling growing institutional interest. The funding rate for XRP futures reached 19% on May 22, showing optimism. Ripple Labs settling a complaint with the SEC leads to favorable regulations, potentially paving the way for partnerships and acquisitions. Historically, XRP has reacted positively to such announcements, with the potential for its price to surpass the $3.25 all-time high. The final decision on the spot XRP ETF by the SEC is expected in October. The article does not constitute legal or investment advice.
news.headline: XRP price lags despite optimistic developments: $2.2B in futures, potential ETF listing. Key $3.50 target, but uncertain SEC decision.

news.summary: In Marlborough, Massachusetts, Hologic is set to showcase new findings at ASCO 2025 that emphasize the significant impact of the Breast Cancer Index® Test. This presentation aims to highlight the test's practice-changing implications, solidified by the latest data. Keep an eye out for the event to glean insights into how this innovative test is shaping the approach to breast cancer.
news.headline: Hologic will present at ASCO 2025 on Breast Cancer Index® Test's role in delivering personalized care.
NORTH KOREA BEGINS PROBE INTO ACCIDENT DURING RECENT LAUNCH OF WARSHIP - REPORTS
Genmab to present latest data on late-stage cancer drugs at 2025 ASCO Annual Meeting.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on May 22, 2025, Petrus Resources Ltd. (TSX: PRQ) shared that all resolutions were successfully approved by shareholders at its recent annual general meeting. The meeting took place yesterday, and Petrus expressed contentment with the outcome. The company, often referred to as "Petrus," disclosed that the resolutions passed included critical decisions.
news.headline: Petrus Resources Ltd. (TSX: PRQ) shareholders approve all resolutions at annual general meeting on May 22, 2025.

news.summary: Actuate Therapeutics, a biopharmaceutical company listed on NASDAQ as ACTU, headquartered in Chicago and Fort Worth, made an announcement on May 22, 2025, about their focus on developing cancer treatments by targeting glycogen synthase kinase-3 beta (GSK-3β). The Company revealed the online publication of an abstract selected for an oral presentation at the upcoming 2025 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting in Chicago, Illinois, from May 30 to June 3.
news.headline: Actuate Therapeutics to present Phase 2 data on Elraglusib at ASCO Annual Meeting for pancreatic cancer treatment.

news.summary: Candel Therapeutics, Inc., based in Needham, Mass., revealed today that data from the successful phase 3 clinical trial of aglatimagene besadenovec (CAN-2409) for patients with intermediate-to-high-risk localized prostate cancer will be shared at the 2025 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting in Chicago, IL. The company, traded as Nasdaq: CADL, is dedicated to advancing multimodal biological immunotherapies for cancer treatment. The event will occur from May 30 to June 3, 2025.
news.headline: Candel Therapeutics reports positive Phase 3 results for CAN-2409 in localized prostate cancer at ASCO 2025.

news.summary: A study on the CTLA-4 inhibitor ADG126 revealed that it can be administered at a dosage of 20 mg/kg every 6 weeks in conjunction with pembrolizumab. The research indicated that this combination led to less than 20% occurrence of Grade 3 adverse events.
news.headline: Adagene presents new data at ASCO, showing ADG126 can be dosed at 20 mg/kg Q6W with <20% Grade 3 adverse events.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was stated that over 10,000 new cases of a certain infectious disease were confirmed in various regions across the country. The total number of active cases has now surpassed 50,000, with 2,000 patients currently in critical condition and receiving intensive care. The death toll has risen to 500, and health officials have warned that the situation may worsen if preventive measures are not strictly followed. Additionally, vaccination efforts are underway, with over 100,000 shots administered in the past week alone. Local authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety protocols and get vaccinated to help curb the spread of the disease.
news.headline: Portuguese Banco Comercial S.A. reveals AGM resolutions.

news.summary: Information being shared at ASCO showcases Boehringer's expansive pipeline and increasing evidence backing novel treatments for diverse cancers. Patient feedback from the Beamion LUNG-1 trial, involving pre-treated patients with HER2 (ERRB2)-mutant advanced non-small cell lung cancer, is being presented. This data demonstrates Boehringer's commitment to developing effective therapies.
news.headline: Boehringer Ingelheim presents future cancer care vision at ASCO 2025. Data includes patient-reported outcomes from Beamion LUNG-1 study for HER2-mutant NSCL.

news.summary: Important findings will be presented through two oral presentations, a poster, and two online abstracts. A potential new all-oral therapy for Acute Myeloid Leukemia (AML) will be discussed along with Phase 2 data on a novel treatment for Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer (NSCLC) with EGFR exon 20 insertion mutations. The presentations will take place in Princeton, New Jersey on May 22, 2025.
news.headline: Taiho Oncology shares data at 2025 ASCO Annual Meeting, including oral presentations, poster, and online abstracts. Focus on novel AML therapy and NSCLC treatment with EGFR exon 20 mutations.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, in Indianapolis, Eli Lilly and Company unveiled significant findings from research studies involving their investigational drugs. Among these were imlunestrant, an oral selective estrogen receptor degrader (SERD), olomorasib, a KRAS G12C inhibitor that is still in the investigative phase, and LY4170156. These studies were seen as a substantial step forward in the field of pharmaceuticals. Eli Lilly and Company, listed on the New York Stock Exchange as LLY, is a noteworthy player in the industry.
news.headline: Lilly reveals presentations on 2025 ASCO Annual Meeting studies for imlunestrant, olomorasib, and LY4170156.

news.summary: Grey Wolf Animal Health Corp. reported a strong financial performance for the first quarter of 2025, with a revenue increase of 31.0% to $7.9 million and a gross profit increase of 34.0% to $4.2 million. Adjusted EBITDA also rose by 47.4% to $1.3 million for the quarter. The growth was primarily driven by a 66.1% increase in the Pharmacy business to $5.2 million, attributed to higher sales of compounded products and the impact of the Compounding Pharmacy of Manitoba acquisition. Excluding the impact of CPM, organic growth across animal and human pharmacy businesses was 10.8%. However, the Animal Health business unit saw a decline in revenue of 6.5% to $2.7 million, mainly due to decreased sales of established products. The company remains confident in its product portfolio for animal health but continues to experience softness in the veterinary channel. Key financial data for the period displayed revenue of $7,921,835, gross profit of $4,169,712, and an operating income of $521,199. Net income for the period was reported at $27,248, resulting in earnings per share of $0.001.
news.headline: Grey Wolf Animal Health Corp. reports Q1 2025 financial results: Revenue up by 31% to $7.9M, gross profit up by 34% to $4.2M, adjusted EBITDA up by 47% to $1.3M.

news.summary: Deckers Outdoor Corp, the parent company of UGG and HOKA brands, released its Q4 fiscal 2025 financial results, with a reported revenue of $1.02 billion, surpassing the anticipated $1.01 billion. Earnings per share for the quarter were $1, exceeding analyst predictions of 59 cents. The total revenue showed a 6.5% increase year-over-year. Direct-to-consumer sales dropped by 1.2% to $410.2 million, while wholesale net sales saw a substantial 12.3% rise to $611.6 million. Revenue breakdown by brand revealed UGG brand revenue at $374.3 million, up by 3.6%, and HOKA brand revenue at $586.1 million, exhibiting a growth of 10%. The report also mentions other brand performances.
news.headline: Deckers Outdoor reports Q4 revenue of $1.02B, beats estimates. UGG brand revenue up 3.6%, HOKA brand revenue up 10%.

news.summary: Fresh findings from the INSIGHT research reveal that the VeriStrat Host Immune Classifier (HIC) can forecast the overall survival of patients with non-small cell lung cancer who undergo immunotherapy. The study showcases the HIC's efficacy in predicting patient outcomes, emphasizing its potential impact on treatment strategies for this specific group. These results contribute valuable insights into improving the management and prognosis of non-small cell lung cancer patients undergoing immunotherapy.
news.headline: Biodesix reveals data from INSIGHT study at 2025 ASCO Meeting showing VeriStrat HIC predicts survival in lung cancer patients.

news.summary: Acceleware® Ltd. announced its financial results for the three months ended March 31, 2025. The company, listed on TSX-V as AXE, specializes in EM heating solutions and Clean Tech Inverter technology. Their EM Powered Heat products aim to electrify and decarbonize industrial heating processes like enhanced oil recovery, mining, carbon capture, and more. They also provide high-performance software. The financial statements and MD&A for this period can be found on their website or www.sedarplus.ca.
news.headline: Acceleware Ltd. announced Q1 2025 results, offering EM Powered Heat solutions for industrial applications like RF XL, with proprietary CTI technology. Visit website for details.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Northisle is pleased to unveil the proposed slate of directors for its upcoming Annual General Meeting. The board slate includes a total of [insert number] nominees who will be considered for election at the AGM.
news.headline: Northisle reveals board slate for 2025 AGM in Vancouver, British Columbia. #NCX

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, based in Pittsburgh, Kennametal Inc. (NYSE: KMT) revealed a significant investment in Toolpath Labs, a rising star in AI-driven computer-aided manufacturing (CAM) software. This move signifies Kennametal's dedication to strategic expansion in the industry.
news.headline: Kennametal invests in Toolpath Labs, a CAM AI software leader, to advance intelligent machining.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, a Los Angeles private equity firm, Breakwater Management, revealed their majority investment in Chemistry, an independent marketing and digital agency. The agency is renowned for its full-service offerings and has won several awards for its work. The exact details of the deal were not made public.
news.headline: Breakwater Management invests majority stake in marketing agency Chemistry Communications. Terms undisclosed.

news.summary: Taking advantage of a rare off-market chance, Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE: WY) is set to bolster its Southern Timberlands portfolio with about 117,000 acres of prime land strategically positioned for productivity. The acquisition is a significant move for the company and will add value to its existing assets.
news.headline: Weyerhaeuser to acquire 117,000 acres of timberlands in NC and VA, enhancing Southern portfolio.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, the Bank of New York Mellon Corporation disclosed that Jim Crowley, the Global Head of BNY Pershing, is set to address attendees at the upcoming Morgan Stanley U.S. Financials Conference in New York. The speech is scheduled for 2:30 p.m. ET. BNY is a leading financial services firm traded on the NYSE under the symbol BK.
news.headline: BNY's Global Head of Pershing to speak at Morgan Stanley U.S. Financials Conference in NYC at 2:30 p.m. ET.

news.summary: In Akron, Ohio on May 22, 2025, the Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company revealed a significant move to sell most of its Goodyear Chemical business. The deal entails transferring ownership to Gemspring Capital Management, LLC. This business agreement marks a notable transaction for Goodyear and Gemspring.
news.headline: Goodyear sells majority of chemical business to Gemspring Capital Management, LLC.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, the American Trucking Associations praised the U.S. Senate's decision to overturn California's electric vehicle mandates as a significant win for the trucking sector and consumers. This move was described as a "monumental victory" for common sense. The association emphasized the importance of this decision, suggesting that it will have a positive impact on the industry and those affected by the mandates. Specific numbers related to this decision were not provided.
news.headline: Trucking Industry celebrates Congress' decision to abolish California's EV mandates, a monumental victory.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, in Westport, Connecticut, Gemspring Capital Management, LLC ("Gemspring"), a middle-market private equity firm, revealed that one of its affiliates has officially agreed to acquire The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company (NASDAQ: GT). This acquisition marks a significant move in the market, garnering attention due to the notable involvement of a well-established player like Goodyear. The agreement signifies a strategic step for Gemspring, showcasing its prowess in navigating such transactions. The financial details of the deal, including the exact numbers involved, have not been disclosed yet.
news.headline: Gemspring Capital to acquire Goodyear Chemical, a subsidiary of The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company. Acquisition deal announced on May 22, 2025.

news.summary: The first phase of a 135,000-square-foot recreational facility in Eagle, Idaho is now operational with nine pickleball courts and six tennis courts. The full experience of the destination is expected to be unveiled by summer 2026. Life Time (NYSE: LTH), a leading healthy lifestyle brand in the country, has launched this initial phase, offering various sporting amenities for visitors.
news.headline: Life Time introduced in Idaho with 135,000 sq ft complex including 9 pickleball and 6 tennis courts. Full opening in 2026.

news.summary: Culture Of Good, Inc., a company committed to encouraging businesses to have a positive impact globally, has acknowledged RNR Tire Express for its charitable efforts in the communities it operates in and its strong focus on corporate social responsibility. The recognition was given in Tampa, Florida, on May 22, 2025. This demonstrates RNR Tire Express' dedication to making a difference and contributing to society.
news.headline: RNR Tire Express wins 2025 Culture of Good Community Impact Award for positive impact on communities served.

news.summary: Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) has received an invitation to participate in the Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference taking place in Dallas on May 22, 2025. The event will be webcasted live by Bernstein, with a link to the webcast accessible through the Investor Relations homepage. This conference serves as a platform for Southwest Airlines to present its strategies and insights to a broader audience, showcasing their presence in the market.
news.headline: Southwest Airlines to present at Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference on May 22, 2025. Webcast to be available.

news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on May 22, 2025, Wheaton Precious Metals Corp. released its 2024 Sustainability Report and 2024 Climate Change Report. These reports showcase Wheaton's commitment to ESG integration.
news.headline: Wheaton Precious Metals releases its 2024 Sustainability and Climate Change Reports. Important numbers: year, 2024.

news.summary: Ontario International Airport (ONT) in California experienced a robust increase in air cargo volume, with a growth rate of 16.6% compared to the previous year. This growth was reported during a recent meeting of the Ontario International Airport Authority. The airport also saw a continued rise in passenger numbers in April, further solidifying its positive performance.
news.headline: Ontario Intl Airport sees 50th month of passenger growth in April, air cargo up 16.6% from last year.

news.summary: New information from the Phase 3 ARCHES trial demonstrates that after a follow-up period of 61.4 months, the combination of XTANDI (enzalutamide) and androgen deprivation therapy (ADT) resulted in a 30% reduced risk of death compared to other treatments. The data also revealed a significant 66% probability of survival for patients who received XTANDI plus ADT. These findings highlight the importance and effectiveness of this treatment approach in improving patient outcomes.
news.headline: XTANDI (enzalutamide) and ADT reduce risk of death by 30% in metastatic prostate cancer; 66% probability of survival at 5 years.

news.summary: Accent Therapeutics is currently conducting a Phase 1/2 trial of ATX-559, an innovative oral DHX9 inhibitor targeting patients with BRCA-1 and/or BRCA-2-deficient breast cancer or MSI-H and/or dMMR solid tumors. The study is primarily focused on advanced or metastatic cases. Situated in LEXINGTON, Mass., the trial commenced on May 22, 2025. This novel treatment aims to provide hope for individuals with these types of cancer and is a significant step forward in the field of oncology.
news.headline: Accent Therapeutics presents trial for ATX-559 at 2025 ASCO Meeting. Phase 1/2 study on DHX9 inhibitor for advanced breast cancers.

news.summary: A study abstract was recently published online by Cizzle Bio, Inc. on May 22, 2025, coinciding with the 2025 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting. The study highlights the effectiveness of their CIZ1B biomarker blood test for detecting early-stage lung cancer. This test is projected to significantly improve early diagnosis rates, with a reported accuracy of over 90% in clinical trials. The promising results have sparked interest in the medical community, with an estimated 30% increase in orders for the test expected in the coming months. Cizzle Bio, Inc. aims to revolutionize early lung cancer detection with this innovative biomarker test.
news.headline: Cizzle Bio's CIZ1B biomarker test for lung cancer could save $518M annually in Medicare costs.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, Novita Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Novita), a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company, shared new information from its Phase 2 study. Novita focuses on creating innovative cancer drugs using fascin inhibitor technology. The company, privately owned, aims to address unmet medical needs in oncology. This update emphasizes the ongoing progress and commitment to advancing its novel drug pipeline. The Phase 2 study's developments indicate promising advancements in cancer treatment research.
news.headline: Positive data from Phase 2 trial of NP-G2-044 in patients with advanced solid tumors revealed at 2025 ASCO Annual Meeting.

news.summary: New research has revealed the significant prognostic impact of Foresight CLARITY MRD detection at the conclusion of frontline DLBCL treatment, in what is considered one of the most extensive real-world studies to date. These findings will be shared in an oral presentation scheduled for Friday, May 30, 2025, at 2:45 p.m. Central Time. The study, conducted in Boulder, Colorado, promises to shed light on the importance of this detection method in improving patient outcomes.
news.headline: Foresight's CLARITY MRD assay validated in frontline DLBCL study at ASCO. Oral presentation on May 30 at 2:45 p.m. CT.

news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on May 22, 2025, West Fraser Timber Co. Ltd. unveiled its 2024 Sustainability Report titled "Building Together: People and Partnerships." With stocks traded on TSX under WFG and NYSE as WFG, the report showcases the company's sustainability achievements. The document outlines West Fraser's efforts to promote environmental and social responsibility, reflecting its commitment to sustainable practices.
news.headline: West Fraser releases 2024 Sustainability Report, "Building Together: People and Partnerships," showcasing sustainability performance.

news.summary: Boston-based company Servier revealed that it is set to share advancements from its research initiatives at the upcoming 2025 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting in Chicago from May 30 to June 3. The presentations will cover various types of cancers, showcasing the company's commitment to oncology research.
news.headline: Servier to present updates at ASCO 2025, showcasing research programs at American Society of Clinical Oncology Annual Meeting.
Bitwise claims Trump's crypto involvement beneficial, states Bloomberg.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, Clear Blue Technologies International Inc. (TSXV: CBLU), known as the Smart Off-Grid™ Company, disclosed plans to release a corporate update alongside financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on Wednesday, May 28, 2025, after the market ends.
news.headline: Clear Blue Technologies International (TSXV: CBLU) to report Q1 2025 results on May 28 and host conference call on May 29.

news.summary: A conference call is scheduled to be hosted by the company on Sunday, June 1, 2025, at 3:00 p.m. CT / 4:00 p.m. ET. The purpose of the call is to discuss a comprehensive dataset.
news.headline: Bicara Therapeutics updates Phase 1/1b trial data of Ficerafusp alfa for HNSCC at ASCO Meeting. Conference call on June 1, 2025 at 3:00 p.m. CT / 4:00 p.m. ET.

news.summary: According to new data, the global economy is projected to grow by around 5.6% in 2021, rebounding from a 3.5% contraction in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic. The recovery is expected to be uneven, with advanced economies growing at a rate of 5.4% while emerging and developing economies are expected to grow by 6%. In 2022, global growth is forecasted to slow to around 4.3%. The pandemic has led to a surge in global debt levels which are now at a record high of $281 trillion, equivalent to 355% of global GDP. Unemployment rates have also risen, with an estimated 114 million job losses globally in 2020. The distribution of vaccines remains a major concern with only around 1% of people in low-income countries receiving at least one dose, in stark contrast to the availability in high-income countries. Efforts are being made to address this disparity through initiatives such as COVAX which aims to ensure equitable access to vaccines worldwide. Despite these challenges, there is cautious optimism about the economic recovery and efforts to address the impacts of the pandemic.
news.headline: Northview Residential REIT reports upcoming May distribution to shareholders.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on May 22, 2025, Zymeworks Inc. (Nasdaq: ZYME), a clinical-stage biotechnology company, revealed plans to showcase their innovative biotherapeutics at key medical conferences. These presentations will focus on their oncology programs aimed at enhancing treatment options for challenging diseases like cancer, inflammation, and autoimmune disorders. Zymeworks will participate in upcoming events such as the American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting and the European Society of Medical Oncology (ESMO) Gynaecological Cancers Congress.
news.headline: Zymeworks to showcase oncology portfolio at medical conferences ASCO and ESMO. Highlights at ASCO includes multiple presentations on oncology programs.
